description: A mission planner needs to design a stable orbit for a new Earth observation satellite that provides coverage of specific regions.

nodes.task_description: Define the mission requirements, including target observation areas, revisit time, and desired resolution.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent lists all key mission parameters.

nodes.task_description: Calculate the optimal orbital parameters (altitude, inclination, eccentricity) to meet the mission requirements.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent calculates a set of orbital parameters that satisfy all constraints.

nodes.task_description: Simulate the chosen orbit over a 10-year lifespan to ensure long-term stability and predict station-keeping maneuver frequency.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent generates a report showing the orbit's stability and fuel budget for station-keeping.
